title: Electro Retro Disco Flourescent Ball
description: This May, as the Fringe transforms Brighton, the English Disco Lovers invite you to something altogether more luminous. A celebration of rhythm, colour and joy. Welcome to Electro Retro Disco Fluorescent Ball, an immersive ultraviolet party! The Spiegeltent is already a jewel box of mirrors, velvet and vintage magic. For one unforgettable night, we're going to glow it up! For this party, Retro disco outfits are encouraged, adored, and celebrated. Think vintage clubwear, 70s silhouettes, 80s excess, jumpsuits, flares, mesh, metallics, anything glowable that makes you feel like dancing before you've even arrived. On the door and throughout the night, our Fluoro Crew will be on hand, ready to transform you using non-toxic, chalk-based fluorescent paints that glow spectacularly under our UV lighting for a donation to our chosen charity, the fabulous STAY UP LATE (stayuplate.org) English Disco Lovers DJ SAM MOFFETT plus special guest Gem will be playing those great 80s 12 inch da
content_warnings: This performance includes UV lighting and non toxic chalk-based UV paint
